## Tasks Completed
- **task_user_notif_routing**: Route Claude Code desktop notifications to the claw desktop WhatsApp group (separate from main)
- **lex-2-mkt-01**: [Phase 2 · Marketing] Update landing page from coming-soon to live product — lexios-coming-soon.html exists. Needs demo video, feature showcase, sign-up flow.
- **lex-2-mkt-03**: [Phase 2 · Marketing] Build developer onboarding flow — signup → API key → first extraction in 5 minutes. auth.py has key generation but no onboarding UX.
- **lex-2-ai-03**: [Phase 2 · AI/ML] Implement local model substitution — train_loop.py exists (273 lines) but local model extraction not implemented. Goal: Ollama for cost savings where quality ≥85%.
- **lex-2-prod-01**: [Phase 2 · Product] Add pricing page to frontend — 3-tier pricing with feature comparison. Connect to Stripe checkout.
- **lex-2-prod-02**: [Phase 2 · Product] Customer billing dashboard — usage history, invoices, payment methods. No billing UI exists.
- **lex-3-sales-04**: [Phase 3 · Sales] Set up free trial tier — 5 document analyses/month for beta testers
- **lex-3-sales-05**: [Phase 3 · Sales] Build customer feedback pipeline — in-app feedback form, NPS survey, monthly calls
- **lex-3-prod-01**: [Phase 3 · Product] Add compliance report generation — compliance.py works (2 jurisdictions, 90 rules) but no user-facing PDF/HTML report export for plan reviewers.
- **lex-3-prod-02**: [Phase 3 · Product] Add conflict detection UI — cross-discipline conflict visualization. ConflictDetection class is mocked; needs real implementation.
- **lex-3-prod-03**: [Phase 3 · Product] Add quantity takeoff export — itemized quantities, cost estimation, CSV export. QuantityTakeoff class is mocked; needs real implementation.
